'''Purghom Musical Performance Hall''', sometimes referred to as "'''Purghom hall'''" or simply "'''Purghom'''," was a famous [[concert hall]] in the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Weogar/Legends|Weogar]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]]. It was the venue of choice for a two-[[Standard week/Legends|week]]-long, sold-out tour featuring the [[Drum/Legends|percussion]] [[Band/Legends|group]] [[Shluur]], and was used by the group's [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Musician/Legends|arranger]], [[Wurokkk]], as a [[Music/Legends|musical]] [[Wurokkk's musical piece|experiment]] that ended in disaster for the Bith audience.

==Description==
The Purghom Musical Performance Hall, sometimes called "Purghom hall" or "Purghom," was a [[concert hall]] located in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Weogar/Legends|Weogar]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]], [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It was a gigantic circular auditorium with a massive [[Color/Legends|golden]] [[Chandelier/Legends|chandelier]] mounted at the center of the ceiling as its defining aspect.<ref name="GATORW" />

==History==
[[Orchestra]]s, [[Band/Legends|bands]], and other [[Music/Legends|musical]] groups from cities across Clak'dor VII played at the famous concert hall, and occasionally off-planet acts were allowed to perform at the venue. The Bith had an unmatched love for music, and thus no style or instrument was too "common" for the hall; however, all acts had to be of utmost excellence in order to be permitted a performance on its stage. One such performance included a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Musician/Legends|singer]] and at least two Bith musicians. The diverse [[Drum/Legends|percussion]] group [[Shluur]] visited the concert hall during a tour that consisted of two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]]' worth of sold-out performances. These concerts were used as an experiment for the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Wurokkk]], one of the group's arrangers. Wurokkk composed a [[Wurokkk's musical piece|piece]] designed to subliminally bring out aggressive behavior in Bith based on vibrations and [[Brain/Legends|brainwave]] patterns.<ref name="GATORW" />

{{RPGseed}}
The ensuing chaos that resulted from the experiment led to a government investigation that eventually brought Wurokkk's plans to light. When confronted, the Wookiee was content with the success of his experiment but was nevertheless escorted off-planet. Wurokkk may have had a sonic-based surprise awaiting his escorts.<ref name="GATORW" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Purghom Musical Performance Hall was introduced in the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', released in [[2004]] by [[Wizards of the Coast]] and written by [[Craig Robert Carey|Craig R. Carey]], [[Jason Fry]], [[Jeff Quick]], and [[Daniel Wallace]]. The location was used in an adventure seed titled "Beat of a Different Drum."<ref name="GATORW" />
